data.title: Is “Banana Zone” Still Relevant To The Price Of Bitcoin?
data.description:
Bitcoin’s widely discussed “banana zone” appears to be developing differently this cycle compared to previous bull markets, prompting questions about the next move for the price of Bitcoin.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/28/is-banana-zone-still-relevant-to-the-price-of-bitcoin/

data.title: Elon Musk’s xAI buys Twitter (X) for $33 billion, less than initial purchase price
data.description:
Elon Musk has merged xAI, his artificial intelligence startup, with his social media company X, in an all-stock deal that values X at $33 billion, nearly $11 billion less than what he paid to buy Twitter in late 2022. The transaction was announced on Friday, and Elon posted on X that the two companies’ futures […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/elon-musks-xai-buys-twitter-x-for-33-billion/

data.title: Trump to announce pharmaceutical tariffs soon, open to negotiations
data.description:
President Donald Trump said on Friday that he would announce tariffs on pharmaceutical imports but declined to say whether life-saving drugs would be spared or reveal the exact rates. He is also open to negotiations that could potentially reduce the new taxes planned for next week, yet he does not expect deals before April 2. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-to-announce-pharma-tariffs/

data.title: ‘Hawk Tuah’ girl says SEC closed its investigation into her crypto scam
data.description:
Haliey Welch, better known online as the “Hawk Tuah” girl, says the SEC is done investigating her role in the failed $HAWK token project, and she’s not facing any charges. The investigation began after her meme coin blew up in price and then dropped 91% in less than three hours, leaving thousands of people wrecked. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hawk-tuah-girl-sec-closed-its-investigation/
